Notice Of Motion And Motion To Stay Action Pending Mediation
Off Calendar Aug-29-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES: Atty. SAMANTHA R. STAROBA, ESQ. of Gibbs, Giden, Locher, Turner, Senet & Wittbrodt LLP (Tel: 310-552-3400) appearing via CourtCall for plaintiff American Direct Procurement, Inc.;
No other appearances made in this case.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF AMERICAN DIRECT PROCUREMENT, INC.'s Motion To Stay Action Pending Mediation.

Matter discussed by the Court and plaintiff's counsel as to issue of service on the parties. The Court adopts its tentative ruling to grant PLAINTIFF AMERICAN DIRECT PROCUREMENT, INC.'s Motion To Stay Action Pending Mediation.

(Counsel for plaintiff is reminded by the Court to submit courtesy copies of all filed and lodged papers with department 302 as required by the Local Rules.)

Order signed in open court.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/EPS)
